name: FlagShots
address: 2109 Main St Suite G, Dunedin, FL 34698
about: FlagShots is Dunedin's only golf simulator venue, offering a high-tech indoor golf experience available 24/7. The facility features bays equipped with state-of-the-art launch monitors that provide accurate data and allow players to simulate rounds on the world's top golf courses. The venue operates on a self-service model where guests unlock their designated bay via their phone, making it accessible for play at any time of day.

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are encouraged to bring their own food and drinks
Guests are encouraged to bring their own alcohol

pricing_model: Hourly rentals and Memberships (Birdie, Open, Masters)
amenities_list: BYO Food and Drink|PGA Pro Lessons|Private Bays|24/7 Access

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are generally expected to bring your own clubs, though the website notes that rental sets will be available soon.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, FlagShots encourages guests to bring their own food and drinks to enjoy in the bays.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round on a simulator takes approximately 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly, but children should be supervised and able to safely handle golf equipment.
